ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_code" TEXT /* Code representing the location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the location belongs */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the location */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "partners" (
  "partner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade partner */,
  "partner_code" TEXT /* Code representing the trade partner */,
  "partner_name" TEXT /* Name of the trade partner */,
  "relationship_status" TEXT /* Current status of the trade relationship */,
  "trade_agreements" TEXT /* Details of any trade agreements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "hs_product_code" TEXT /* HS code for the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category to which the product belongs */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "product_weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "origin_country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade data entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location */,
  "partner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trade partner */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trade data */,
  "export_value" REAL /* Export value for the product */,
  "import_value" REAL /* Import value for the product */,
  "hs_eci" REAL /* Economic Complexity Index (ECI) for the product */,
  "hs_coi" REAL /* Complexity of Imports (COI) for the product */,
  "trade_balance" REAL /* Trade balance for the product */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of trade values */,
  "currency_exchange_rate" REAL /* Currency exchange rate for the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_partner_id FOREIGN KEY ("partner_id") REFERENCES partners ("partner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "subscription_level" TEXT /* Subscription level of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization to which the user belongs */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trade data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was issued */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Level of severity of the notification */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES trade_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "subscription_level" TEXT /* Level of the subscription */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subscription */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subscription */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission relationship */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
column_names: Region to which the location belongs
Unique identifier for each trade partner
Current status of the trade relationship
Category to which the product belongs
Country of origin of the product
Unique identifier for each trade data entry
Economic Complexity Index (ECI) for the product
